BUSINESS GLOSSARY - Enterprise System
Last Updated: 2024-03-15
Status: Partial (pending review)

==========================================
CUSTOMER MANAGEMENT
==========================================

Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts)

Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer bu... [TRUNCATED]

DATA DICTIONARY - Enterprise Database
Version: 2.1 (incomplete documentation)
Last Updated: 2024-02-28

==========================================
CUSTOMERS
==========================================

Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| customer_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id |
|... [TRUNCATED]

Foreign Keys:
- customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?)
- [missing other FK definitions]

==========================================

==========================================

|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| order_item_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| product_id | INTEGER | FK | R... [TRUNCATED]

==========================================
PAYMENTS
==========================================

Primary Key: payment_id (unverified)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| payment_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| PaymentID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| customer_id | INTEGER | FK | References CUSTOMERS |
| payment_date | DATETIME | ? | [missing docu... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Account Holder
triplets.object: the person designated as the primary owner of an account

triplets.subject: End User
triplets.object: the actual user of a product or service

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: a request to purchase products or services

triplets.subject: Transaction
triplets.object: similar to Order but more general

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: an order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation

triplets.subject: Quote
triplets.object: a preliminary order with estimated pricing

triplets.subject: SKU
triplets.object: a unique identifier for a product variant

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.object: the transfer of money to settle an order

triplets.subject: Shipment
triplets.object: the process of delivering goods to a customer

triplets.subject: Delivery
triplets.object: the completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer

triplets.subject: Fulfillment
triplets.object: the process of preparing and delivering orders

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or organization that purchases goods or services from a business.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete] | Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA) | Email address | Contact phone number | References customer (which table?) | Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. | Possible duplicate of customer_id

entities_post_resolution.name: Financial Transaction
entities_post_resolution.definition: A financial transaction is any monetary exchange involving the transfer of funds or assets between parties.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. | Transaction
Similar to Order but more general.

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order is a formal request to purchase products or services, which includes identifiers, dates, statuses, and specific types like sales orders.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
See valid values in... [missing reference] | Primary Key: order_id (or OrderID - verify) | Date order was created | Total order amount | Shipping cost | Tax amount | Order
A request to purchase products or services. | different precision? | Possible duplicate | Sales Order
An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation.

entities_post_resolution.name: Total Amount
entities_post_resolution.definition: TaxAmount refers to the specific monetary value of taxes calculated on a transaction or income.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: [duplicate?] | Tax amount

entities_post_resolution.name: Request To Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: Purchase is the act or process of acquiring goods or services in exchange for payment.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Order
A request to purchase products or services. | Invoice
A document requesting payment. | Purchase
The act of buying something.

entities_post_resolution.name: Person Or Organization
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity that can be an individual or an organization, typically involved in transactions or interactions within a business context.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. | Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

entities_post_resolution.name: Revenue From Selling Products
entities_post_resolution.definition: Revenue from selling products is the income earned by a business from its primary activity of selling goods to customers.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales
Revenue from selling products. | Revenue
Income from sales.

entities_post_resolution.name: Process Of Preparing
entities_post_resolution.definition: Order fulfillment encompasses all steps involved in preparing, processing, and delivering customer orders.
synonyms: the process of delivering goods to a customer
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. | Shipment
The process of delivering goods to a customer.

entities_post_resolution.name: Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: Contact methods used to reach an individual or entity, including email addresses and phone numbers.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: [possible duplicate] | Email address | Contact phone number

entities_post_resolution.name: Name Components First
entities_post_resolution.definition: Name components representing a customer's given name and family name used for identification purposes.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Customer's first name | [appears to be duplicate] | Customer's last name

tables_enriched.name: Customers
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about customers, including their contact details, account status, type, and regional information.

tables_enriched.name: Orders
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about customer orders, including order details, status, amounts, payment information, and timestamps for record creation and updates.

tables_enriched.name: Order Items
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about individual items within customer orders, including product details, quantities, pricing, discounts, and total amounts for each line item.

tables_enriched.name: Products
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about products, including identifiers, names, categories, pricing, stock levels, and descriptions for inventory management and sales purposes.

tables_enriched.name: Payments
tables_enriched.description: This table records details of payments made for orders, including transaction identifiers, payment methods, statuses, and response information.
